name: wake-word-continuous
description: Continuous wake-word detection (openWakeWord via ONNX Runtime Web) + Silero-VAD 5s-silence end-pointed capture for the CJ Panganiban museum kiosk. Fully open-source. No Picovoice. No per-device licensing. Bundles to a single hermetic JS file consumed by Streamlit declare_component.

scripts.prebuild: npm run fetch-models && npm run copy-ort-wasm
